name: CDPA (Zimbabwe Cyber and Data Protection Act)
description: Self-assessment against key data protection requirements for Zimbabwean organisations under CDPA.

sections.name: Governance and accountability
sections.description: Leadership ownership, policies, roles, and oversight for data protection.

questions.text: Has your organisation assigned a person accountable for data protection?
questions.helpText: This can be a formal DPO role or a clearly named responsible officer.

guidance.title: Has your organisation assigned a person accountable for data protection?
guidance.risk: For has-dpo, this control demonstrates accountable privacy management and defensible compliance under Zimbabwe data protection law by proving that 'Has your organisation assigned a person accountable for data protection?' is governed, executed, and reviewable within Governance and accountability. This includes demonstrable remediation governance, verifiable operating evidence, and traceable management accountability for has-dpo.
actions: Define and approve a targeted remediation plan for has-dpo with named control ownership.
Implement and operationalize process/technical changes needed to satisfy 'Has your organisation assigned a person accountable for data protection?'.
Perform management review and control assurance testing for has-dpo, then formally close findings.
evidence: Approved procedure or standard mapped to has-dpo and section 'Governance and accountability'.
Dated operating records showing execution of 'Has your organisation assigned a person accountable for data protection?' over the latest review cycle.
Management or committee evidence confirming oversight decisions and remediation tracking for has-dpo.
Independent testing or QA validation confirming 'Has your organisation assigned a person accountable for data protection?' operates effectively and exceptions are remediated.

questions.recommendation: In Governance and accountability, close gap has-dpo by formalizing control execution for 'Has your organisation assigned a person accountable for data protection?'. Document accountable ownership, implementation milestones, and operating cadence aligned to privacy governance, lawful processing, and data-subject rights under Zimbabwe data protection obligations. Execute remediation in phases (design, deployment, and assurance review), and track milestones for has-dpo in governance reporting until sustained effectiveness is demonstrated.
